name: All-American Clam Chowder (Bush Family Favorite)
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Bacon, cut crosswise into 1/2" pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a Dutch oven over medium heat until crisp. Remove the bacon with a slotted spoon to paper towels to drain. Coarsely chop the bacon and set aside.
2. Carefully pour off all but 1 tablespoon of the bacon fat. Add the onion to the Dutch oven; cook over medium-low heat until tender and lightly browned, about 6 minutes. Add the reserved liquid from the clams and the potatoes. Lower the heat; simmer, covered, until the potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Add the celery soup, milk, and pepper to the Dutch oven. Gently heat through; do not boil. Stir in the reserved clams and bacon. Gently heat through. Serve the chowder immediately.
